headline: How Dollar Tree (DLTR) Is Using Store Closures and Higher Price Points to Defend Margins
summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ:DLTR) is one of the stocks most affected by inflation. On March 16, 2026, Dollar Tree said it expects to close about 75 stores in fiscal 2026, even as it plans roughly 400 new openings, signaling that the company is pruning weaker locations while continuing to expand. The update came with its […]

headline: Dollar Tree fixes big shopper complaint about pricing
summary: Shopping at Dollar Tree used to be pretty predictable. You'd walk in, check out the selection, and load up your basket knowing confidently that your bill wouldn't be too terrible. But that was the old Dollar Tree. Today's Dollar Tree works differently. Not only is that $1 base price point long ...

headline: Truist Cuts PT on Dollar Tree (DLTR) to $142 From $156 – Here’s Why
summary: Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ:DLTR) is one of the best undervalued defensive stocks for 2026. Truist cut the price target on Dollar Tree, Inc.
